reason: Codex runtime returned a usage-limit error (resets 2026-06-20); the write-enabled review could not run. Fell back to a manual re-derivation: verified ZOH discretization (scalar integration of the leaky integrator), the gating theorem (N=1,A=-1,B=1 => h_t=(1-g_t)h_{t-1}+g_t x_t, g=sigma(Linear(x))), the associative scan operator and its associativity in both groupings, FLOPs O(BLDN) vs O(BLD log L), IO reduction by factor N, and the 3ED^2/12D^2 parameter budget, all against the retrieved arXiv:2312.00752 source; code checked against canonical mamba_simple.py.
